title: MG Economy
description: Simple economy mod for multiplayer servers
body:
### **This mod does not use vault. This is a standalone mod.**

MG Economy is a simple light-weight mod that adds a basic economy to minecraft. This mod is great for small modded servers that want a basic economy without needing any lib mods or other required mods. This mod currently only supports forge 1.20.1 and ports to diffrent versions are no

### Items
- $1, $5, $10 Bill
### Commands
- /Pay <Player> <Amount>
- /Balance <Player>
- /Withdraw <Amount>
- /SetBalance <Player> <Amount> (OP Only)
### Other Features
Click(use) money to add it to your bank account
XP Based money
  -   Players will receive an amount of money based on their xp level every time they reach a new level maxing out at 100 (still get money but that is where it stops giving bigger amounts per level)
###  Planned features
- option to disable add money animation
